description_long: This is a single-story house with a rectangular footprint, set on a green lawn base. The house features a brown gable roof with moderate overhangs and beige exterior walls. The front facade includes a small covered porch with steps leading up to the main entry door, and a cylindrical structure adjacent to the porch, possibly representing a utility feature. Windows are arranged asymmetrically, with a mix of single and double-pane styles, and the side elevations show additional windows for natural light. The rear of the house is plain, lacking windows or doors, while the side opposite the porch has a gable end with a single window. The overall design is simple and functional, typical of suburban or rural residential architecture.
description: A beige, single-story house with a brown gable roof, front porch, and asymmetrical window arrangement, set on a green lawn. The design is simple and functional, with a small entryway and modest exterior details.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry porch with steps, a cylindrical utility feature, and the brown gable roof.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the gable end, two windows, and the extension of the porch structure.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain beige wall with no windows or doors, and the overhanging roof.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing a single window on the gable end and the side profile of the porch.
attribute_entryway_design: Small covered porch with steps, simple door, and adjacent cylindrical utility feature
